config.name: cisco_ios_logs-latest_transform
config.lua_code:
-- SentinelOne Parser: cisco_ios_logs-latest
-- OCSF Class: Network Activity (4001)
-- Performance Level: High-volume optimized
-- Generated: 2025-10-13T12:16:06.062031

-- Pre-compile patterns for better performance
local patterns = {
    ip = "^%d+%.%d+%.%d+%.%d+$",
    severity = {
        emerg = 5,
        alert = 4, 
        crit = 4,
        err = 3,
        warning = 3,
        notice = 2,
        info = 1,
        debug = 1
    },
    interface_status = {
        up = 1,
        down = 2
    }
}

function transform(record)
    -- Input validation with early return
    if not record or type(record) ~= "table" then
        return nil, "Invalid input record"
    end

    -- Initialize OCSF-compliant output with local variables
    local output = {
        class_uid = 4001,
        class_name = "Network Activity",
        category_uid = 4,
        category_name = "Network Activity",
        type_uid = 400199,
        activity_id = 99,
        activity_name = "Other",
        metadata = {},
        device = {},
        observables = {}
    }

    -- Efficient field mapping using local variables
    local time = record.timestamp
    local hostname = record.hostname
    local device_ip = record.device_ip
    local severity = record.severity
    local message = record.message
    local raw_message = record.raw_message
    local facility_mnemonic = record.facility_mnemonic
    local mnemonic = record.mnemonic
    local sequence_number = record.sequence_number
    local interface_name = record.interface_name
    local interface_status = record.interface_status

    -- Timestamp handling
    if time then
        output.time = time
    else
        output.time = os.time() * 1000
    end

    -- Device information
    if hostname then output.device.hostname = hostname end
    if device_ip then
        output.device.ip = device_ip
        -- Add to observables if valid IP
        if string.match(device_ip, patterns.ip) then
            table.insert(output.observables, {
                name = "device_ip",
                type = "IP Address", 
                value = device_ip
            })
        end
    end

    -- Message fields
    if message then output.message = message end
    if raw_message then output.raw_data = raw_message end

    -- Metadata fields
    if facility_mnemonic then 
        output.metadata.product = {
            feature = {
                name = facility_mnemonic
            }
        }
    end
    if sequence_number then
        output.metadata.sequence = tonumber(sequence_number) or sequence_number
    end

    -- Type name
    if mnemonic then output.type_name = mnemonic end

    -- Severity mapping
    if severity and patterns.severity[severity] then
        output.severity_id = patterns.severity[severity]
    end

    -- Interface specific handling
    if interface_name or interface_status then
        output.type_uid = 400102
        output.activity_id = 2
        output.activity_name = "Interface Change"
        
        if interface_name then
            output.device.interface_name = interface_name
        end
        
        if interface_status then
            output.status = interface_status
            output.status_id = patterns.interface_status[interface_status:lower()] or 0
        end
    end

    -- Validation of required fields
    if not output.class_uid or output.class_uid == 0 then
        return nil, "Invalid class_uid"
    end

    -- Clean empty tables
    if next(output.metadata) == nil then output.metadata = nil end
    if next(output.device) == nil then output.device = nil end
    if next(output.observables) == nil then output.observables = nil end

    return output
end
